children.label: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.name: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR3AO

children.label: MOVECDEMO-CU03-
children.name: MOVECDEMO-CU03-
children.originalText:
MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
          ?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
          ?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR3AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM DELETE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM DELETE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.name:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.originalText:
IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR3AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM DELETE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR3AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM DELETE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.name:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.originalText:
IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR3AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM DELETE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF

children.label: _DIALECT_1вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.name: _DIALECT_1вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 1 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹

children.label: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.name: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.originalText:
SET ERR-FLG-OFF     TO TRUE
           SET USR-MODIFIED-NO TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR3AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR3AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM DELETE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: MOVESPACESTOFNA
children.name: MOVESPACESTOFNA
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI

children.label: MOVEUSRIDINIOFC
children.name: MOVEUSRIDINIOFC
children.originalText: MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF

children.label: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.name: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.

children.label: MOVESEC-USR-FNA
children.name: MOVESEC-USR-FNA
children.originalText: MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI

children.label: MOVESEC-USR-LNA
children.name: MOVESEC-USR-LNA
children.originalText: MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI

children.label: MOVESEC-USR-TYP
children.name: MOVESEC-USR-TYP
children.originalText: MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR3AI

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR3AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR3AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-IF

children.label: IFNOTERR-FLG-ON
children.name: IFNOTERR-FLG-ON
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR3AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-IF.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: MOVEUSRIDINIOFC
children.name: MOVEUSRIDINIOFC
children.originalText: MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
               PERFORM DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
               PERFORM DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF

children.label: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.name: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
               PERFORM DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF

children.label: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.name: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           _DIALECT_ 2 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
               вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.

children.label: MOVEWS-MESSAGET
children.name: MOVEWS-MESSAGET
children.originalText: MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COUSR3AO

children.label: PERFORMPOPULATE
children.name: PERFORMPOPULATE
children.originalText:
PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COUSR3AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 3 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.

children.label: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.name: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.originalText: MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR3AO

children.label: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.name: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.originalText: MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR3AO

children.label: MOVEWS-TRANIDTO
children.name: MOVEWS-TRANIDTO
children.originalText: MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR3AO

children.label: MOVEWS-PGMNAMET
children.name: MOVEWS-PGMNAMET
children.originalText: MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR3AO

children.label: MOVEWS-CURDATE-
children.name: MOVEWS-CURDATE-
children.originalText: MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR3AO

children.label: MOVEWS-CURTIME-
children.name: MOVEWS-CURTIME-
children.originalText: MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR3AO

children.label: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.name: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.originalText:
MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR3AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR3AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR3AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR3AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR3AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR3AO.

children.label: _DIALECT_5вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.name: _DIALECT_5вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 5 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹   вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹    вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹    вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to delete this user ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: _DIALECT_5вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.name: _DIALECT_5вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 5 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹   вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹    вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹    вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to delete this user ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

children.label: _DIALECT_8вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.name: _DIALECT_8вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 8 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹   вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 9 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been deleted ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 10 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Update User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: _DIALECT_8вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.name: _DIALECT_8вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 8 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹   вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 9 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been deleted ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 10 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Update User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

children.label: MOVESPACESTOUSR
children.name: MOVESPACESTOUSR
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES          TO USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                                   FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE

children.label: MOVE-1TOUSRIDIN
children.name: MOVE-1TOUSRIDIN
children.originalText:
MOVE -1              TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                                   FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.

label: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/d69ee36d-6e18-4705-92b2-6e8f07c7939f
name: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/d69ee36d-6e18-4705-92b2-6e8f07c7939f
originalText:
MAIN-PARA.
       
           SET ERR-FLG-OFF     TO TRUE
           SET USR-MODIFIED-NO TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR3AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR3AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU03-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM DELETE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
       
       
       
       PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.
       
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR3AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-IF.
       
       
       
       
       DELETE-USER-INFO.
       
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
               PERFORM DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.
       
       
       
       
       RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN.
       
           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           _DIALECT_ 2 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
               вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
       
       
       
       SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COUSR3AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 3 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
       
       
       
       RECEIVE-USRDEL-SCREEN.
       
           _DIALECT_ 4 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                     вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
       
       
       
       POPULATE-HEADER-INFO.
       
           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR3AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR3AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR3AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR3AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR3AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR3AO.
       
       
       
       
       READ-USER-SEC-FILE.
       
           _DIALECT_ 5 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹   вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹    вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹    вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to delete this user ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.
       
       
       
       
       DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE.
       
           _DIALECT_ 8 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹   вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹      вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
           вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 9 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been deleted ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 10 вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Update User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.
       
       
       
       
       CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
           PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN.
       
       
       
       
       INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
       
           MOVE -1              TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI
                                   FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.
